---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for cawk
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description

<!-- Clear and concise description of the feature -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem this feature solves. Why is it needed? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your proposed implementation or approach -->

## Use Case

<!-- Provide a concrete use case or example of how this feature would be used -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other solutions or workarounds? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, examples, or references -->

## Impact

- **Scope:** (e.g., all suppliers, specific suppliers, build system, reporting)
- **Breaking changes:** (Yes/No — would this require changes to existing workflows?)
- **Priority:** (Low / Medium / High)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for similar feature requests
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case
- [ ] I understand this is a community project and may take time to implement
